text_original: He who has in himself abundantly the attributes (of the Dao) is like an infant.
text_normalized: He who has in himself abundantly the attributes (of the Dao) is like an infant.

text_original: Poisonous insects will not sting him; fierce beasts will not seize him; birds of prey will not strike him.
text_normalized: Poisonous insects will not sting him; fierce beasts will not seize him; birds of prey will not strike him.

text_original: (The infant's) bones are weak and its sinews soft, but yet its grasp is firm.
text_normalized: (The infant's) bones are weak and its sinews soft, but yet its grasp is firm.

text_original: It knows not yet the union of male and female, and yet its virile member may be excited; - showing the perfection of its physical essence.
text_normalized: It knows not yet the union of male and female, and yet its virile member may be excited; - showing the perfection of its physical essence.

text_original: All day long it will cry without its throat becoming hoarse; - showing the harmony (in its constitution).
text_normalized: All day long it will cry without its throat becoming hoarse; - showing the harmony (in its constitution).

text_original: To him by whom this harmony is known,
text_normalized: To him by whom this harmony is known,

text_original: (The secret of) the unchanging (Dao) is shown,
text_normalized: (The secret of) the unchanging (Dao) is shown,

text_original: And in the knowledge wisdom finds its throne.
text_normalized: And in the knowledge wisdom finds its throne.

text_original: All life-increasing arts to evil turn;
text_normalized: All life-increasing arts to evil turn;

text_original: Where the mind makes the vital breath to burn,
text_normalized: Where the mind makes the vital breath to burn,

text_original: When things have become strong, they (then) become old, which may be said to be contrary to the Dao.
text_normalized: When things have become strong, they (then) become old, which may be said to be contrary to the Dao.

text_original: Whatever is contrary to the Dao soon ends.
text_normalized: Whatever is contrary to the Dao soon ends.
